---
name: Good first issue
about: Propose (or, for maintainers, scope) a small, self-contained starter task
title: "[good first issue] "
labels: good first issue
---

## The task
One or two sentences: what should exist afterwards that doesn't today.

## Where
Files or areas to touch, with a pattern to copy:
- Code: `chimera/...`
- Pattern to follow: `chimera/... / tests/test_...` (an existing example doing a similar thing)

## Done when
- [ ] The change works (a command / test demonstrating it)
- [ ] A test covers the new behaviour
- [ ] `make check` is green (ruff + mypy + pytest)

## Scope guard (keep it small)
What is intentionally **out** of scope, so the PR stays reviewable. Ask here if unsure — narrowing
the scope is part of the help.
